LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrain_Structure_PsychicLureAnte: An organic antenna that emits a psychoactive hum while active, drawing raiders and enraging animals as dangerous biomass for the colony.
LanguageData.FB_PsychicLureAntenna_NoMap: The antenna is not on a valid map.
LanguageData.FB_PsychicLureAntenna_NotPlayerOwned: The antenna must belong to the player colony.
LanguageData.FB_PsychicLureAntenna_Released: The psychic lure antenna broadcasts into the dark. A hostile response should arrive in {0}.
LanguageData.FB_PsychicLureAntenna_PulseDissipated: The psychic lure dissipates without drawing a valid threat.
LanguageData.FB_PsychicLureAntenna_DevResetCooldownDe: Immediately clears this antenna's psychic lure timer and cancels any pending psychic response.
LanguageData.FB_PsychicLureAntenna_ToggleDesc: Toggle high-output lure broadcasting. While active, the antenna consumes {0} hemogel per hour and calls a hostile response every {1}-{2}.
LanguageData.FB_PsychicLureAntenna_InspectNoNetworkSu: Psychic lure broadcast paused: hemogel network underfed.
